prompt: Write a 12-slide Series A pitch deck v2 for openpatent.ai, slide-by-slide, targeting a $50M pre-money round. Each slide: title (≤6 words), 1-sentence headline, 3 bullet points (each ≤18 words), 1 visual cue. Slides: (1) Title — 'The Hive Is Open' + CSOAI Ltd UK, (2) Problem — AI-idea-theft at fine-tune speed, (3) Solution — 6-layer cryptographic disclosure, (4) Product Demo — disclose a model in 9 minutes, (5) 5-LOCK Monopoly — Rex/Atlas/Nova/Marcus/Sage, (6) Market — $184B IP services TAM / $42B SAM / $4.2B SOM, (7) Traction — 27 .ai domains, 23+10 MCP tools, BFT council live, (8) Business Model — 5-tier ladder $29/$149/$999/$2499/$4999, (9) Moat — why 3 of 5 LOCKS are compound, (10) Team — 3 founders + 7 engineers, (11) Ask — $15M Series A, 18-month runway, (12) Vision — 'Every AI asset finds its hive'. Use DEFENEOS mythic voice. Return ONLY JSON: {slides:[{n:int, title:string, headline:string, bullets:[3 strings], visual:string}]}.
